templates.name: If / Else
templates.description: Conditional branch — drop nodes into Then / Else zones.

templates.name: ForEach Loop
templates.description: Iterate a collection — drop nodes into the Body zone. Wire a collection into Source.

templates.name: Try / Catch
templates.description: Error handling — drop nodes into Try / Catch / Finally zones.

templates.name: While Loop
templates.description: Repeat while a condition is true — drop nodes into the Body zone.

templates.name: Function
templates.description: Define a callable function — Parameters declare the signature, Body runs each call.
